name: Vegetable Sauce (Usda)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in the flour and salt until well combined.
3. Gradually add the milk while stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
4. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring frequently, until it thickens.
5. Add the cooked mixed vegetables and stir until heated through.
6. Adjust the temperature as desired before serving.
